title: Digestion and Bead Cleanup
author: Opentrons
materials: Pause protocol (‘move sample plate to heater shaker’)
Pause protocol (‘move sample plate to magnetic mod’)

steps.title: This protocols performs a blead cleanup...
steps.instruction: This protocols performs a blead cleanup on the OT-2 with overnight digestion step for 16, 32, or 48 samples. For detailed description of requirements and steps, please see below.

steps.title: 12 well reservoir (liquid stock plate) contains
steps.instruction: 12 well reservoir (liquid stock plate) contains: A1= 100% ACN, A2= 70% ethanol

steps.title: Eppendorf rack (liquid stock epps) contains
steps.instruction: Eppendorf rack (liquid stock epps) contains: A1= bead solution, A2= 200 mM TEAB, A3= 5% HA, A4= 20% formic acid

steps.title: Homogenize bead solution in A1 of...
steps.instruction: Homogenize bead solution in A1 of Eppendorf rack (50 µl 3x, fast speed)

steps.title: 4 µl beads from A1 to...
steps.instruction: 4 µl beads from A1 to column 1-6* of slot 1 (same tips)

steps.title: 30 µl of sample from column...
steps.instruction: 30 µl of sample from column 1-6* slot 2 to column 1-6* slot 1 (A1 to A1, B2 to B2 etc, new tip always)

steps.title: 70 µl of 100% ACN to...
steps.instruction: 70 µl of 100% ACN to column 1-6* of slot 1 (airgap, mix after every time, 3x low speed, new tip always)

steps.title: Engage magnetic module (magnetic beads as low as possible)
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module (magnetic beads as low as possible)

steps.title: Remove 100 µl from column 1-6*...
steps.instruction: Remove 100 µl from column 1-6* of slot 1, dispose in reservoir slot 11 (Consolidate, same tips)

steps.title: Add 100 µl 70% ethanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl 70% ethanol to column 1-6* of slot 1 (one tip)

steps.title: Remove 100 µl from column 1-6*...
steps.instruction: Remove 100 µl from column 1-6* of slot 1, dispose in reservoir slot 11 (Consolidate, same tips)

steps.title: Repeat step 11-12
steps.instruction: Repeat step 11-12

steps.title: Add 10 µl digestion solution to...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µl digestion solution to column 1-6* slot 1 (mix every time, 1x slowly, new tip always)

steps.title: Close HS module
steps.instruction: Close HS module

steps.title: Heater activate (37°C)
steps.instruction: Heater activate (37°C)

steps.title: Open HS module
steps.instruction: Open HS module

steps.title: Engage magnetic module (magnetic beads as low as possible)
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module (magnetic beads as low as possible)

steps.title: Move 10 µl from column 1-6*...
steps.instruction: Move 10 µl from column 1-6* of slot 1 to new position in the same plate, according to the ‘sample transfer layout’ scheme attached (new tips always, low speed aspirate, away from mag beads, touch tip after dispense)

steps.title: Add 5µl 200 mM TEAB to...
steps.instruction: Add 5µl 200 mM TEAB to all TMT wells (new tip always, mix 3x)

steps.title: Add 9 µl TMT/buffer mix from...
steps.instruction: Add 9 µl TMT/buffer mix from slot 9 to all samples**, according to the attached scheme ‘TMT layout’ (A1 -> A3, A5 or A7, B1 -> B3, B5 or B7 etc., new tip always, mix 3x low speed)

steps.title: Add 5 µl 5% HA to...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µl 5% HA to all samples** (new tip always, mix every time, 1x medium speed)

steps.title: Consolidate samples into one Eppendorf (B5-8...
steps.instruction: Consolidate samples into one Eppendorf (B5-8 of slot 3), every two columns of samples combined into one epp (for triplos: column 7 + 8 from sample plate to B5 of slot 3, column 9 + 10 to B6 of slot 3, column 11 + 12 to B7, for monoplo: column 3 + 4 to B5)

steps.title: Add 10 µl 20% formic acid...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µl 20% formic acid to slots B5-8* of slot 3 (new tip always, mix after every time 3x high speed)
